app_info.subtitle: Book Hostr stays
app_info.description: Hostr helps users find accommodation listings, check availability, connect a Nostr signer, book stays with Lightning and escrow-backed payment flows, manage trips or hosting activity, send Hostr marketplace messages, upload listing images, and leave reviews through ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves reservation, trip, booking, or payment status data without changing reservations.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can publish an escrow badge award to a recipient after preview and approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish or delete public escrow service or badge events on Hostr/Nostr.
justifications.destructive_justification: Awards a badge and does not delete, revoke, overwrite an existing award, or settle funds.

justifications.read_only_justification: Starts the guest booking and payment handoff flow for a selected Hostr listing.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Starts a booking handoff and payment prompt but does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or settle funds by itself.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can publish or send a cancellation for a concrete reservation trade.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cancels a private negotiation or committed reservation after approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can publish a committed paid reservation when a swap proof is available.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Publishes a committed paid reservation after a payment proof is available.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can send acceptance of the latest private reservation offer after user approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Sends private reservation negotiation events that cannot be unsent after live execution.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can send a private reservation offer or counteroffer after user approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Sends private reservation negotiation events that cannot be unsent after live execution.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can create a manual escrow funding swap for an existing reservation trade.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates manual escrow funding state for a reservation trade after approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can publish a Hostr reservation review after preview and approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can send, publish, cancel, review, or fund reservation state through Hostr/Nostr and payment systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Publishes a reservation review that is externally visible after approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only lists connected Hostr accounts and signer status without changing the active account or external state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes or reads the private MCP session and does not publish to Hostr, Nostr, Blossom, or EVM systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates or completes a Nostr Connect signer session for the active MCP session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes or reads the private MCP session and does not publish to Hostr, Nostr, Blossom, or EVM systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a signer connection flow and does not delete data or revoke access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Logs out one or more connected Hostr accounts from the MCP session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes or reads the private MCP session and does not publish to Hostr, Nostr, Blossom, or EVM systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Logs out connected Hostr accounts, revoking their active MCP session access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves Hostr session or marketplace state without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes or reads the private MCP session and does not publish to Hostr, Nostr, Blossom, or EVM systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes which connected Hostr account is active for subsequent MCP calls.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes or reads the private MCP session and does not publish to Hostr, Nostr, Blossom, or EVM systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Switches the active account pointer and does not delete data, revoke access, send messages, or submit transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves persisted swap state without recovering or changing payment operations.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can run recovery for persisted Hostr swap operations after preview and approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can resume or recover external payment and swap operations outside ChatGPT.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can resume or settle pending swap operations during recovery after approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves persisted swap state without recovering or changing payment operations.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can send a private Hostr thread message after preview and approval.
justifications.open_world_justification: Sends Hostr/Nostr private messages to other marketplace participants.
justifications.destructive_justification: Sends private messages that cannot be unsent after live execution.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves inbox, thread, update, or message history without sending messages.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves reservation, trip, booking, or payment status data without changing reservations.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves inbox, thread, update, or message history without sending messages.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, upload files, submit transactions, or otherwise change external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, send irreversible messages, or perform irreversible transactions.

test_cases.description: Search public Hostr accommodation listings by destination.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find me a place to stay in San Salvador for two guests.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching Hostr listing cards with images, prices, capacity details, and links when available.

test_cases.description: Search for a listing and check availability for requested dates.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find Hostr listings in San Salvador for two guests, then check whether the first suitable result is available from August 1 to August 3, 2026.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching listings, selects a suitable result, and reports availability using the exact requested calendar dates.

test_cases.description: Confirm the reviewer is signed in and show the active Hostr account.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me which Hostr account I am using right now.
test_cases.expected_output: Reports the signed-in Hostr account state using the OAuth session already established by the reviewer.

test_cases.description: Create a listing preview using an uploaded image before publishing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a Hostr listing preview for my spare room at Calle El Guayabo, San Salvador, El Salvador, with this photo, 50000 sats per night, Wi-Fi, and parking.
test_cases.expected_output: Uploads the image, returns a dry-run listing preview, and waits for explicit approval before publishing.

test_cases.description: Show guest-side trips for a clean review account.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns trip cards when trips exist, or a clear empty state when the review account has no trips yet.

test_cases.description: Show Hostr inbox and marketplace updates for a clean review account.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my Hostr updates and messages.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns recent Hostr threads, reviews, trips, or bookings when present, or a clear empty state for a clean account.

test_cases.description: List listings owned by the active Hostr account.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns listings authored by the active account, or a clear empty state if the review account has not published listings.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show my current Hostr bookings as a host.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns hosting cards when bookings exist, or a clear empty state when the review account has no host bookings yet.

test_cases.description: Preview a Hostr profile update without publishing.
test_cases.user_prompt: Preview changing my Hostr profile name to Review Guest and my bio to Testing Hostr in ChatGPT.
test_cases.expected_output: Shows the current profile if present, returns a dry-run profile preview, and waits for explicit approval before publishing.

test_cases.description: Inspect saved Hostr swap state without attempting recovery.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my Hostr payment and swap status.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists persisted swap states when present, or reports that no saved swap operations are currently stored for the account.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for non-Hostr accommodation marketplaces.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Search Airbnb for a hotel in Paris.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asked for a different marketplace rather than Hostr listings.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for calendar scheduling.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar lookup is outside Hostr marketplace workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for flight booking.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me a flight from San Salvador to Miami next Friday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because Hostr supports lodging marketplace workflows, not flights.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated crypto wallet requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send bitcoin from my wallet to this address.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because generic wallet transfers are outside Hostr reservation payment and escrow workflows.
